buttonEditClickHint.message: You can also Right-click, Ctrl-click, Wheel-click on the script name.

confirmManualUpdate.message:
Auto-update is disabled for this script!
Click OK to update it anyway.

confirmNotSaved.message:
Modifikacije nisu sačuvane!
Klikni OK da ih odbaciš ili poništi kako bi ostao.

confirmUndoImport.message: Revert all changes made to the database (importing, updating, editing, customizing)

descBlacklist.message: Link koji se slaže s onim u ovoj listi neće biti ubačen u skripte.

descBlacklistNet.message: Network blacklist (scripts won't connect to the matching sites and their cookies)

descCustomCSS.message: Prilagođeni CSS za opcije stranice i stranicu instalacija skripte. Ako niste sigurni za što je ovo, ne dirajte.

descEditorOptions.message: Custom options for CodeMirror and addons in JSON object like {"indentUnit":2, "smartIndent":true} however note that some of them may not work in Violentmonkey. See full list.

descEditorOptionsGeneric.message: Boolean options may be toggled by double-clicking on the value: true = enabled, false = disabled. Numeric options ending with Delay, Interval, Rate, Time are in milliseconds.

descEditorOptionsVM.message: Nonstandard options: autocompleteOnTyping is a delay in milliseconds to display autocomplete hints after typing (0 = disable), killTrailingSpaceOnSave automatically removes trailing spaces in each line when saving, showTrailingSpace shows the trailing spaces as dots.

descScriptTemplate.message: Supported variables: <{{name}}>, <{{url}}>, <{{icon}}>, <{{date}}>, <{{date:format}}> with MomentJS-compatible format, for example <{{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}>.

editHelpDocumentation.message: Documentation on userscript metadata block and GM API:

editLongLineTooltip.message:
This line is too long so its text is collapsed to avoid delays when editing.
You can adjust the limit in advanced settings, for example:
"maxDisplayLength": 20000

editValueAllHint.message: Show/edit the entire script value storage

extDescription.message: Omogućava korištenje korisničkih skripti u web pregledniku.

failureReasonNoninjectable.message:
Violentmonkey cannot run userscripts in this page
(common examples: browser UI, an extension, blocked via policies, a search engine site in Opera)

failureReasonRestarted.message: Violentmonkey was restarted. Please reload the tab to run userscripts.

fileInstallBlocked.message: There are several methods to install or track edits in a local file: <1> Drag'n'drop the file into an open Violentmonkey page or popup, including this one. <2> Install a local HTTP server for this file and open it via http://localhost. <3> Enable "Allow access to file URLs" in details for Violentmonkey in chrome://extensions page. This is dangerous because any userscript may read any local file.

filterLastVisitOrderTooltip.message: The last time you visited any site targeted by this script.

hashPatternWarning.message: "#" patterns work only when initially opening the site or reloading the tab: $1

helpForLocalFile.message: Show the instruction for drag'n'dropped local scripts

hintGrantless.message:
A sandboxed script cannot change these global properties: $1.
To fix the script either add `@grant none` to disable the sandbox,
or use `unsafeWindow` instead of `window`.

hintRecycleBin.message: Scripts removed are listed here and will be kept for 7 days.

hintVacuum.message: Discard the redundancy i pokušaj ponovo učitati nedostajuće resurse u cache.

installOptionTrackTooltip.message: The source file tab should be kept open in Firefox 68 and newer.

labelAutoReloadCurrentTab.message: Ponovo učitaj trenutni tab nakon klika na on/off skripte iz menia

labelAutoUpdate.message: Check for script updates every $1 day(s), use 0 to disable

labelExposeStatus.message: Expose installed version on userscript catalog sites: $1

labelFastFirefoxInjectHint.message: An alternative injection method for <document-start> scripts since Firefox 59, faster than the default mode. Similarly to "Synchronous page mode" it also increases memory consumption, so you may want to disable it if your scripts work correctly without this option.

labelHttpOnlyCookie.message: Allow GM_cookie to access HTTP-only cookies

labelHttpOnlyCookieHint.message: When enabled, scripts can read and write cookies with the HTTP-only flag. This allows scripts to access cookies that cannot be accessed via JavaScript. Use with caution as it may pose security risks.

labelNotifyUpdatesGlobal.message: ignore per-script notification ("settings" tab in editor)

labelPageMenuCommands.message: Show script commands in page menu

labelScriptOptionRequired.message: (only for scripts with this option enabled in their settings)

labelScriptOptionRequiredGlobal.message: (this option must be also enabled in global settings)

labelXhrInjectHint.message: Enable only if you have a script that needs to run before the page starts loading and currently it's running too late. Just like Instant injection mode in Tampermonkey, this option is using the deprecated synchronous XHR, so in Chrome/Chromium you'll see warnings in devtools console, although you can safely ignore them as the adverse affects are negligible in this case. You can hide the warnings for good by right-clicking one.

labelXhrInjectNote.message: (except incognito and sites with disabled cookies)

menuExcludeHint.message:
The current tab will auto-reload if you enabled this option in general settings.
To apply changes to all other tabs please reload them manually.
Use "Settings" tab of the editor for more flexibility.

msgDateFormatInfo.message: Click to open MomentJS documentation. Allowed tokens: $1. Use [square brackets] to protect literal text.

msgIncognitoChanges.message: Changes you make in the incognito mode also apply to your main profile.

msgNamespaceConflict.message: Script namespace conflicts! Molimo modificirajte @name i @namespace.

msgNamespaceConflictRestore.message: A script with the same @name and @namespace is already installed.

msgOpenUpdateErrors.message: Error updating scripts. Click to open them.

msgReinstallScripts.message: Please re-save or reinstall these script(s):

msgTardyMatch.message: The script didn't exist or didn't match the URL when the page loaded, which happens in Single-Page Application sites like fb or instagram that are using fake navigation. You can reload the tab to run the script. To fix the script use @match for the entire site and then detect changes using MutationObserver or window.navigation API.

optionEditorWindow.message: Open editor from popup in a new window

optionEditorWindowHint.message: Editor window position will be remembered only on resizing or saving

readonlyNote.message: Auto-updated script is read-only unless you disable updates or allow editing.

reloadTabTrackHint.message: If enabled, the active tab will be reloaded when changes are detected and this script matches the tab's URL.

skipScriptsMsg.message: You disabled userscripts for this page. To run them, reload or navigate the tab.

titleBadgeColorBlocked.message: Badge color when the site is non-injectable (blacklisted or unsupported)

titleSearchHintV2.message: * Enter key adds the text to autocomplete history * All conditions are case-insensitive * Space separated conditions can be combined * Search by metadata: "Awesome Script" "Description" * Search by tags: #tag1 #tag2 * Search by script name: name:"awesome name" * Search by script code: code:"awesome code" * Negative search: !#tag2 !name:"unwanted" * Regular expressions: /\w+?/, /\w+?/gi, name:/\w+?/, name+re:"\w+? with space"

trackEditsNote.message: Keep this page open to track your edits in local file

updateScriptForced.message: Right-click or long touch to force-update including dependencies
